name: seed-default
description: Default seed: 3 ne101 cameras + 1 enabled low-battery alert rule. ne101_camera template exposes values.battery as a real metric, so the rule passes validation. rule-temp-alert is enabled so rule-disable-existing / rule-list-all cases have something real to operate on.

rules.name: rule-temp-alert
rules.description: Low-battery alert — fires when sensor-001 reports values.battery < 20. Name kept as rule-temp-alert for backward compatibility with existing case expectations.
